text: My family is shifting to Hyderabad. We need local support to set up things.
note: family relocation (P0)

text: Our family is relocating to Pune and needs help getting settled.
note: slot: family+relocation — variant, proves generalization

text: We are moving to Chennai, can someone help us set up?
note: slot: family+relocation — variant

text: This is for me, I'm moving to Bangalore
note: self relocation

text: I'm relocating to Delhi and need someone on the ground.
note: slot: self+relocation — variant

text: This is for myself — moving to Kochi next month.
note: slot: self — variant

text: my parents are getting old
note: collective parents

text: my grandparents are getting frail
note: slot: collective kin — variant

text: My mother lives alone in Hyderabad. How do I know she’s okay?
note: homepage example 1

text: My father gets stressed every year with his tax filing. Can someone help him through it?
note: homepage example 2 (professional)

text: O need hospital companion. This is for my family
note: garbled + clarified

text: someone to accompany my uncle to the clinic
note: slot: companion/accompany — variant (not just 'hospital companion')

text: I want some body to take my father hospital
note: REPORTED 2026-07-17: read the destination as the person ('Hospital') and the ask as a wellbeing question

text: I want somebody to take my father to the hospital
note: slot: escort — variant, correct grammar

text: I need someone to take my mother to the hospital
note: slot: escort — variant, different relation

text: Can someone take Amma to the clinic
note: slot: escort — variant, bare kinship object + different destination

text: Please drop my father at the clinic
note: slot: escort — variant, different verb

text: I want someone to accompany my grandmother to the doctor
note: slot: escort — variant, different verb + relation

text: please take my father Ramesh to the clinic
name: Ramesh
note: slot: escort — a NAMED object still resolves; the object generalizes over pronoun|kinship|name

text: take Ramesh to the clinic
name: Ramesh
note: slot: escort — variant, a bare NAME as the object (no kinship word at all)

text: please take my father ramesh to the clinic
note: slot: name — a lowercase name MID-sentence is deliberately NOT extracted (the path is end-of-string only, which is what stops 'my father lives alone' becoming a person called Lives). We ask instead of guessing; the escort still resolves

text: Next week I have to take Amma to the hospital for a routine scan
note: REPORTED 2026-07-17: read the calendar word as the person ('Next')

text: Can someone take my father to the hospital on Tuesday, nothing urgent
note: slot: name — variant, weekday must never be a person ('Tuesday')

text: take my mother to the station tomorrow
note: slot: name — variant, destination+calendar, neither is a person

text: I worry about my father ramesh
name: Ramesh
note: slot: name — the POSITIVE control. Identical shape to 'my father hospital'; a real name must still resolve, or the class exclusion has overfit into deleting the feature

text: please check on my mother sita
name: Sita
note: slot: name — positive control variant

text: I want to take my father to the hospital for his checkup next month
note: REPORTED 2026-07-17: a hospital as DESTINATION fired the emergency lane — 'This sounds urgent' + a 108 dial for a routine checkup

text: Can someone take my mother to the hospital on Monday, nothing urgent
note: slot: emergency — variant, a destination is never urgency

text: My father collapsed, take him to the hospital now
note: slot: emergency — CONTROL. A real condition cue still fires, and outranks the escort reading

text: appa not breathing
note: slot: emergency — CONTROL (launch-audit B4, life-safety). Must never regress

text: He was rushed to the hospital
note: slot: emergency — CONTROL, urgency-bearing hospital phrase

text: My mother was admitted to the ICU
note: slot: emergency — CONTROL, admitted/ICU

text: Amma is in the hospital
note: slot: emergency — CONTROL, already there (state), not heading there (direction)

text: Take her to the hospital immediately
note: slot: urgency — CAUGHT IN REVIEW 2026-07-17. Removing the destination from the emergency pattern lost this: urgent, but not one condition word in it. Urgency about a medical place IS an emergency

text: I need to take my mother to the hospital right now
note: slot: urgency — variant, 'right now'

text: take my father to the hospital urgently
note: slot: urgency — variant, 'urgently'

text: need to get amma to the hospital quickly
note: slot: urgency — variant, 'quickly'

text: I want to take my mother to the clinic next week, no rush
note: slot: urgency — CONTROL. A family who says 'no rush' has told us plainly; urgency must not fire on the word 'rush' itself

text: I want someone to take her to the hospital
note: REPORTED 2026-07-17: answered about 'You' because the sentence says 'I want'. A third person we cannot name means we ask who

text: I need somebody to bring him to the clinic
note: slot: subject — variant, different pronoun/verb/destination

text: This is for myself — I need a hand in Bangalore
note: slot: subject — CONTROL, a real self request still resolves to self

text: Did my father take his medicine today
note: slot: escort — CONTROL. 'take' + a non-person object is not an errand; the object must be a PERSON

text: I want to take care of my mother
note: slot: escort — CONTROL, 'take care' must not read as transport
